title: Hyperflow Configuration
description: Hyperflow configuration. Lives at ~/.hyperflow/config.json. Agents run on the current session model — there is no model configuration.

security.description: Security layer configuration. Controls blocked files, commands, and secret detection.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the security layer. Default: true.

allowedFiles.description: File patterns that are explicitly allowed (not blocked), e.g. .env.example.

compactionThreshold.description: Line count at or above which /hyperflow:cache compact warns and is recommended.

context.description: Conversation context-budget settings used by smart compaction hooks.

windowTokens.description: Approximate active model context window used to estimate transcript usage.

autoCompactMinPercent.description: Minimum estimated context usage percent before an automatic compact is allowed.

autoCompactReadyTtlMinutes.description: How long a dispatch-end compact readiness marker remains valid for automatic compaction.

handoff.description: Two-session handoff transport settings (skills/hyperflow/session-handoff.md). Controls the committed handoff package written on a session=two scope run.

autoPush.description: Push the package commit (and the build-complete commit) automatically. On failure the exact git push command is surfaced; the commit always lands locally. Default: true.

remote.description: Git remote to push/pull the handoff package. Default: origin.

packageDir.description: Committed directory (repo-root, sibling to gitignored .hyperflow/) holding handoff packages. Default: .hyperflow-handoff.

specialists.description: Specialist agent registry settings (agents/*.md). Specialists reuse existing roles (reviewer/debugger/searcher/decision-maker) — no new role keys. Every specialist runs on the current session model.

brain.description: The Brain specialist router that selects the responsible roster after triage.

enabled.description: Enable the Brain router. When false, the triage specialists[] derivation is used directly without the reasoned pass. Default: true.

webResearch.description: Web-research-first protocol settings (skills/hyperflow/web-research.md). Runs only on gated flows.

enabled.description: Enable the web-research-first step for specialists on gated flows. Default: true.

maxSources.description: Max sources a specialist consults per research pass. Security/vuln specialists floor at 5.

recencyMonths.description: Preferred source recency window in months (CVE/security prefer 6).

offlineSkip.description: When offline or WebSearch is unavailable, skip web-research gracefully (logged) instead of blocking. Default: true.

flowGate.description: Flow profiles on which web-research-first is allowed to run.
